# PasscodeSettingsCustomRegexObject

**Object**

A regular expression and its description to enforce password compliance.

## Declaration

```swift
object PasscodeSettingsCustomRegexObject
```

## Objects

- **PasscodeSettingsCustomRegex_DescriptionObject**: A dictionary that contains supported OS language IDs for the keys and values that represent a localized description of the policy that the regular expression enforces.

items.description: A dictionary that contains supported OS language IDs for the keys and values that represent a localized description of the policy that the regular expression enforces.
